briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: Compute auto-numbering text for PowerPoint list items according to ST_TextAutonumberScheme — supports arabic, alphabetic, and roman numeral sequences with various formatting styles.

detaileddescription.para: \par \b Scope\/ \: List item numbering computation for PPTX reader. \par \b Input\/ \: Numbering scheme string (e.g. "arabicPeriod") and integer shift. \par \b Output\/ \: Formatted numbering string (e.g. "2. "). \par \b Links\/ \: [USES_API(8): dedoc.readers.pptx_reader.PptxReader] \par \b Invariants\/ \:

listitem.para: get_text ALWAYS returns a non-empty string for valid numbering schemes. \par \b Rationale\/ \:

detaileddescription.para: Q: Why a dedicated extractor instead of inline code in the PPTX reader? A: ST_TextAutonumberScheme has multiple variants — isolation simplifies testing and allows independent evolution. \par \b Changes\/ \:
LAST_CHANGE: [v1.0.0 – Added SEMANTIC TEMPLATE markup and LDD logging.] \par \b Module Map\/ \:
CLASS [8][PPTX list item numbering computer] => NumberingExtractor \par \b Use Cases\/ \:
